name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers payday loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with multiple locations across the U.S. and online lending options.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating physical store locations across the United States, with a significant presence in major markets. The company provides a range of short-term lending and financial services designed to serve customers seeking quick access to cash. Their service menu includes installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payment processing, money transfers, business services, and tax preparation services. The company operates both physical store locations and online lending platforms to reach customers through multiple channels. ACE Cash Express has faced regulatory scrutiny typical of the payday lending industry, and their website includes California-specific privacy notices reflecting state regulatory requirements. The company positions itself as an alternative to traditional banking for customers who need rapid access to funds or have limited access to conventional credit. However, the specific terms, rates, and availability of services vary significantly by state, as evidenced by the "this type of loan is not available in this state" messaging on their website. This geographic variation reflects the highly regulated nature of short-term lending in the United States.
address: 2716 W Indian School Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85017

company_info.headquarters: 2716 W Indian School Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85017

pros: Multiple service offerings beyond payday loans including title loans, installment loans, check cashing, and money transfers
Both physical store locations and online lending platform available for customer convenience
Same-day or next-day funding capability for emergency cash needs
24/7 customer service phone lines available: (877) ACE-CASH and (866) ACE-CASH
Tax services and business services offered alongside lending products
Established multi-state presence with store locator tool for finding nearby locations
Bill payment services available to help customers manage expenses
cons: Website structure shows multiple 404 errors and broken pages, indicating poor site maintenance and user experience
Service availability varies dramatically by state with no clear upfront disclosure of which services are available where
High-cost lending model typical of payday lenders, though specific APR/fee information not provided on accessible pages
Temporary store closures due to external events (Hurricane Ida referenced) can leave customers without access
Limited transparency about loan terms, rates, and eligibility requirements on the accessible website content
best_for: Consumers needing emergency cash within 24 hours who have exhausted other options
Individuals with vehicle title who need quick collateral-based loans
Customers without access to traditional banking services seeking check cashing and money transfer services
Small business owners seeking quick cash advances or business financial services
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who need access to cash within 24 hours and have collateral (vehicle) or established income. The main caveat is that high-cost debt from payday or title loans can trap borrowers in cycles of repeated borrowing, and service availability is heavily restricted by state regulations—many customers may find products unavailable in their location.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
